description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a slim, rectangular display and a thin black bezel framing the screen. The front view reveals a vivid display showing a planetary scene, suggesting the monitor is powered on. The monitor is supported by a wide, flat rectangular base connected by a central vertical stand, providing stability. The side views highlight the monitor's ultra-thin profile, with the screen and stand both appearing sleek and minimalistic. The rear view is plain, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding, emphasizing a clean and simple design. The overall appearance is contemporary, with a focus on minimalism and functionality, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A slim, modern flat-screen computer monitor with a thin black bezel and a wide, flat base. The design is minimalistic and contemporary, with a vivid display and no visible branding or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a thin black bezel and a wide, flat base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the ultra-thin profile of the monitor and the central vertical stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the flat base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and black with a matte finish, providing a minimalistic frame around the display area. There are no visible decorative elements or color contrasts.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular base with a central vertical support, made of what appears to be black plastic or metal, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single power button is implied at the center of the lower bezel, but no other buttons are visible.
